name: Toni Ironsides
title: Union President

abilities.name: Aggressive Legislation
abilities.text:
Solidarity: When an ally within 6" ends its activation, this model may drain a (soulstone) to move that model up to 6".

Stand Together: When this model is dealt damage by an attack, reduce that damage by 1 for each ally within 3" of the attacker.

Unionized: While within 3" of another ally, this model receives a (+) to its Df and Wp duels.

actions.name: Bosses Beware
actions.effects: X is equal to the number of friendly models within 3" of the target (to a maximum of 4).

triggers.name: The Language of the Unheard
triggers.text: Another friendly model within 3" of the target may declare the Charge action, ignoring engagement.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Picket Line
actions.effects: The target heals 2 and gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: I've Got Your Back!
triggers.text: Engaged ally only. Target is placed in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Will of the Union
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose up to two other allies within range. Once per turn.
actions.effects: Each chosen model moves up to 2" and may declare a non-Charge general action.

triggers.name: Rallying Cry
triggers.text: Each chosen model gains a Focused token.

triggers.name: Spark of Revolution
triggers.text: Each model chosen by this action heals 2.

extraction_notes: The abilities section contains three separate abilities: Solidarity, Stand Together (with fortitude icon), and Unionized (with unusual defense icon). Each ability has distinct mechanics and effects.
Stand Together has a fortitude icon prefix, Unionized has an unusual defense icon prefix
